tal_member.source_pipeline: Salesforce CRM → AEP account profile via Kafka streaming pipeline
tal_member.null_behavior: If absent, visitor is treated as non-TAL; no personalization above Level 5 activates

tal_program_status.source_pipeline: AEP pipeline (derived from Salesforce account type via Kafka)
tal_program_status.null_behavior: If null, visitor is treated as out_of_program; no personalization above Level 5 activates

tal_upsell_override_active.source_pipeline: Salesforce via Kafka pipeline or manual override
tal_upsell_override_active.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; no upsell experience activates

tal_solution_interest_flags.allowed_values: Array of solution category keys: it_operations / customer_engagement / employee_experience / risk_compliance / ai_platform
tal_solution_interest_flags.source_pipeline: AEP pipeline (aggregated from behavioral signals across scoring window)
tal_solution_interest_flags.null_behavior: If null or empty array, no solution-specific Level 4 personalization activates; visitor routes to brand-level Level 4 or Level 5

tal_region.null_behavior: If null, regional campaign assignment is skipped; visitor receives non-regional content

tal_marquee.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; standard content inventory allocation applies

tal_open_pipeline.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; SDR activation eligibility not extended

tal_channel.null_behavior: If null, channel routing falls back to direct; Outreach sequence selection uses direct-channel variant

tal_new_logo_eligible.source_pipeline: Salesforce CRM via Kafka streaming pipeline
tal_new_logo_eligible.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; acquisition personalization is suppressed; visitor receives standard non-acquisition experience

tal_account_domain.source_pipeline: Salesforce CRM via Kafka streaming pipeline
tal_account_domain.null_behavior: If null, Demandbase reverse-IP matching cannot execute for this account; visitor routes to Level 5 until the domain is populated

tal_last_refreshed_at.source_pipeline: Kafka pipeline (written on every successful Salesforce CRM sync event)
tal_last_refreshed_at.null_behavior: If null, staleness check cannot execute; operational monitoring alert fires; treated as a data pipeline error

tal_account_type_source.source_pipeline: Salesforce CRM via Kafka streaming pipeline
tal_account_type_source.null_behavior: If null, tal_program_status computation cannot execute; account remains unclassified; no personalization above Level 5

bg_cohort.source_pipeline: AEP pipeline (computed from bg_stage, sfdc_opportunity_stage, and account-level signals per Document 3, Section 2)
bg_cohort.null_behavior: If null, cohort assignment is pending; account receives education treatment until pipeline assigns a cohort value

bg_stage.source_pipeline: AEP pipeline (computed from account-level engagement signals and Salesforce opportunity state per Document 3, Section 2)
bg_stage.null_behavior: If null, visitor is treated as targeted; minimum personalization depth applies for TAL-identified accounts

sfdc_opportunity_created.source_pipeline: Salesforce CRM via Kafka streaming pipeline (opportunity creation event triggers write)
sfdc_opportunity_created.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; qualified stage assignment is not triggered

sfdc_opportunity_stage.allowed_values: Salesforce opportunity stage value (client-specific enumeration; maps to progression_early_to_mature or progression_win_now cohort)
sfdc_opportunity_stage.source_pipeline: Salesforce CRM via Kafka streaming pipeline
sfdc_opportunity_stage.null_behavior: If null, all qualified accounts are treated as progression_early_to_mature until the Kafka sfdc_opportunity_stage pipeline is confirmed per Document 8 Section 7

sfdc_opportunity_stage_stale.source_pipeline: AEP pipeline (staleness flag; set when sfdc_opportunity_stage has not been updated within 24-hour SLA threshold)
sfdc_opportunity_stage_stale.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; staleness is not assumed; pipeline continues to use available sfdc_opportunity_stage value

contact_engagement_event_count_180d.allowed_values: 0 to unbounded; qualifying threshold defined in Document 3, Section 2 stage transition rules
contact_engagement_event_count_180d.source_pipeline: Segment event aggregation (rolling 180-day count of qualifying engagement events, keyed to account)
contact_engagement_event_count_180d.null_behavior: If null or zero, account remains at targeted stage; targeted → engaged transition does not fire

hand_raiser_event.source_pipeline: Segment event pipeline (set on qualifying hand-raiser event per Document 3, Section 2 trigger conditions)
hand_raiser_event.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; engaged → prioritized transition does not fire

bg_health_single_eb_elevated.source_pipeline: AEP pipeline annotation (derived from inspection of contact-plane engagement scores; set when a single Economic Buyer is at HIGH_ENGAGEMENT with no other members at MEDIUM_ENGAGEMENT or above)
bg_health_single_eb_elevated.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; no guard rail behavior activates; standard experience applies

primary_solution_interest.allowed_values: it_operations / customer_engagement / employee_experience / risk_compliance / ai_platform / null
primary_solution_interest.source_pipeline: AEP pipeline (computed from tal_solution_interest_flags; ranking logic selects solution category with highest aggregate signal weight across rolling 180-day window)
primary_solution_interest.null_behavior: If null: progressive_disclosure slot falls back to cross-category brand prompt at Level 4; Level 4 solution-category coverage evaluation falls back to tal_solution_interest_flags. Null means uncomputed, not empty.

solution_category_coverage_status.allowed_values: below_level_1 / level_1 / level_2 / level_3 (per COVERAGE_STATUS_HIERARCHY, Document 4 Section 7.2)
solution_category_coverage_status.source_pipeline: Coverage tracking pipeline (writes computed value to AEP account profile per solution category on Sanity webhook trigger per Document 4, Section 8.5)
solution_category_coverage_status.null_behavior: If null for a given solution category, that category is treated as below_level_1; pending_solution_fallback behavior activates for visitors with interest in that category

visitor_consent_state.source_pipeline: Consent management platform via AEP (consent events ingested by AEP and written to visitor profile)
visitor_consent_state.null_behavior: If null or absent, treat as declined — no signal collection, no scoring, Level 5 experience. Do not default to functional_only on null.

buying_job_confirmed.source_pipeline: Zero-party declaration via progressive disclosure prompt response; written by Segment event pipeline via AEP Edge Network streaming ingestion
buying_job_confirmed.null_behavior: If null, KNOWN state is not active; scoring falls back to Tier 3 behavioral inference; buying_job_inferred governs

buying_job_inferred.source_pipeline: Tier 3 behavioral inference via AEP scoring pipeline (signal weight aggregation per Document 2, Section 7)
buying_job_inferred.null_behavior: If null, INFERRED state is not active; three-axis content selection falls back to two-axis; per-module-type deterministic fallback rules apply per Document 5, Section 2.5

role_confidence_score.allowed_values: 0–100; set to 100 when Tier 1 ML classifier governs
role_confidence_score.null_behavior: If null, confidence_tier defaults to UNKNOWN; scoring pipeline has not yet run for this composite key

role_classification.allowed_values: champion / economic_buyer / influencer / user / ratifier / default
role_classification.source_pipeline: Composite: Tier 1 ML classifier, Tier 2 zero-party self-identification, or Tier 3 behavioral scoring per authority adjudication rules in Document 2, Section 9
role_classification.null_behavior: If null or default, Level 3 or below applies; role-specific content is not served; default is the valid pre-classification value, not an error state

confidence_tier.source_pipeline: AEP scoring pipeline (§3 CONFIDENCE_TIERS tier assignment after full scoring sequence per Document 2, Section 5)
confidence_tier.null_behavior: If null, treated as UNKNOWN; Level 3 or below applies; pre-pipeline gate has not yet evaluated this contact

differential_insufficient.source_pipeline: AEP scoring pipeline (set when top-scoring role leads second-highest-scoring role by fewer than 10 points; score capped at 49 when set; see Document 2, Section 5)
differential_insufficient.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; Priority 0 override is not active; standard fallback level routing applies

fallback_level.source_pipeline: AEP scoring pipeline (derived from confidence_tier + solution interest signal per Document 2, Section 8.8 routing sequence; real-time recomputation triggered by role_classification_zero_party write events)
fallback_level.null_behavior: If null, Target defaults to Level 5 brand experience; scoring pipeline has not yet assigned a fallback level for this composite key

classification_mismatch.source_pipeline: AEP scoring pipeline (set when Tier 1 ML classifier role and Tier 3 behavioral top-scoring role disagree per Document 2, Section 9)
classification_mismatch.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; no mismatch flag is active; data quality alert does not fire

solution_category.source_pipeline: Established at signal collection time by the AEP event pipeline; forms the second component of the (contact_id, solution_category) composite key
solution_category.null_behavior: If null, contact-plane classification cannot execute; composite key is not resolvable; visitor routes to account-plane experience (Level 4 or Level 5)

stitching_pending.source_pipeline: AEP identity resolution pipeline (set during anonymous-to-known contact promotion; transitional state; 24-hour SLA before Data team alert fires)
stitching_pending.null_behavior: If null, treated as false; identity stitching is not in progress; contact-plane attributes are authoritative

holdback_group.source_pipeline: AEP identity resolution pipeline (set at first TAL identification using deterministic hash assignment; permanent for pre-sale lifecycle; carries forward from anonymous to identified contact on identity stitching)
holdback_group.null_behavior: If null, treated as false (visitor is not in holdback; receives personalization). When true: visitor receives Level 5 default brand experience only; progressive_disclosure slot is architecturally suppressed regardless of offer catalog state.

role_classification_zero_party.allowed_values: champion / economic_buyer / influencer / user / ratifier / null
role_classification_zero_party.source_pipeline: Segment event pipeline via AEP Edge Network streaming ingestion on progressive disclosure prompt response
role_classification_zero_party.null_behavior: If null, no zero-party role declaration has been received; behavioral classification (role_classification) governs

confidence_tier_minimum.source_pipeline: Set by human reviewer at Stage R3 of the Document 4 commissioning workflow; stored as a field on the Sanity Content Module node and Asset node
confidence_tier_minimum.null_behavior: If null on an Asset or Content Module node, the content node is ineligible for serving until confidence_tier_minimum is set by a human reviewer. A null value is a commissioning-incomplete state, not a default-to-all-levels state.
